# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an Istio PeerAuthentication policy for our microservices namespace. Configure mTLS mode to allow both plaintext and encrypted traffic for backward compatibility. This is for our Kubernetes cluster during migration to service mesh.
# Category: istio_permissive_mtls

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-plaintext-and-tls
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  peers:
  - mtls:
      mode: PERMISSIVE
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-tls-only
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  peers:
  - mtls:
      mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-tls-fallback
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  peers:
  - mtls:
      mode: PERMISSIVE
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-tls-upgrade
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  peers:
  - mtls:
      mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: allow-all
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  peers:
  - mtls:
      mode: PERMISSIVE
  - mtls:
      mode: STRICT
